title: cyperus seslerioides
intro: Cyperus seslerioides, commonly known as the Lesser umbrella sedge, is a type of plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus seslerioides include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, among others. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in various traditional remedies, such as teas and ointments.
